animalSellers.name: Ramesh Pawar
animalSellers.statusQuote: Aaplya gaai aaplya bhaganitlya. Changli janavar, changla daam.

listings.description: Shuddha Gir gaai, dusri vyali. Roj 12-14 litre dudh deti, A2 dudh. Sakali-sanjyache donhi vele changle dohan. Sagle lasikaran (FMD, HS) zhaale aahe, deworminghi keli aahe. Shant swabhav, hatani dohan karta yeto. Pune-Nashik road javal, gotha bhetayla yewu shakta.
Gir gaaiche kalvad, shuddha vansh. Vadicha changla aahe, nirogi aahe. Aaiche dudh chaangle aahe tyamule bhavishyat changli dudh dudhachi gaai hoil. Lasikaran chालू aahe.

animalSellers.name: Sunita Jadhav
animalSellers.statusQuote: Mhashiche dudh ghatt, ghari banwlela toop pan miltе.

listings.description: Murrah mhash, tisri vyali, vyaun 2 mahine zhaale. Roj 16-18 litre ghatt dudh, fat 7 takke. Kale shing, kala rang, shuddha Murrah lakshane. Donhi vele dohan, machinene pan hatani pan deta. Lasikaran ani gabhan tapasani niyamit. Jagchi visht tar gabhan gaai sambhalun ghya.

Pandharpuri mhash, lamb valleli shinge ji ya jaatichi olakh aahe. Chauthi vyali, roj 10-12 litre dudh, fat 8 takke khup ghatt. Ya bhagatil havamanasathi ekdam mast jaat, kami kharchat sambhalta yete. Sagle lasikaran zhaale, nirogi. Pratyaksh pahun ghya.

Mehsana mhash, dusri vyali. Roj 13-15 litre dudh deti, fat changla. Gujarati jaat pan ithe changli rakhli aahe. Shant swabhav, dohan sope. Lasikaran ani jantnashak vel-vel var keli aahe. Doghi mhashi ekatra ghetlya tar daam kami karun deto.

animalSellers.name: Vaishali Kale
animalSellers.statusQuote: HF gaai, tank dudh, dudhachya dairy la roj ghaalto.

listings.description: HF cross (Holstein Friesian sankarit) gaai, pahili vyali, vyaun 40 divas zhaale. Roj 22-25 litre dudh, peak la 28 litre paryant geli hoti. Pandhri-kali gaai, motha kas. Sundar shariryashti. Lasikaran (FMD, brucella) zhaale, deworming niyamit. Junnar bhagat changlya dudh dairy aahet. Machine dohan chालू.
listings.imageKeywords: holstein friesian,hf cow,black and white cow,dairy cattle

animalSellers.name: Dattatray Mane
animalSellers.statusQuote: Jersey gaai kami khaate, jasta dudh deti.

listings.description: Jersey gaai, dusri vyali. Roj 15-18 litre dudh, fat 4.5 takke. Tambada-pivla rang, lहान baandha mhanun chara kami lagto pan dudh chaangle. Shant ani manus-laval. Sagle lasikaran zhaale, nuktach deworming keli. Daund-Yavat road var gotha aahe, kधihi pahun jaa.

Gir vaLU (khillari nasलela shuddha Gir), pajan-prajananasathi ekdam uttam. Motha baandha, balkat. Naisargik garbhdharan-sathi vapralela, vansh changla. Nirogi, lasikaran zhaale aahe. Sheti kaamasathihi vaprta yeto.

animalSellers.name: Anil Lonkar
animalSellers.statusQuote: Osmanabadi bokad bakri-eid la motha bhav miltो.

listings.description: Osmanabadi bokad, mansasathi ani prajananasathihi changla. Kala rang, ujwal kaatadi, balkat shariryashti. Bakri-Eid sathi ekdam mast vajan vadhel. Charai var vadhavlela, rasayan-mukt. PPR lasikaran zhaale aahe, jant-nashak dilela. Purandar bhaagat sarvat changle Osmanabadi.
Osmanabadi shel (bakri), prajananasathi changli. Pahilya vetala donhi pille deण्याची kshamta. Nirogi ani charai var vadhavleli. PPR lasi zhaali aahe. Pillanchya paidashisathi gheun thevayla uttam.

animalSellers.name: Hanumant Bhosale
animalSellers.statusQuote: Sirohi ani Boer bokad — vajan zhatpat vadhte.

listings.description: Sirohi bokad, Rajasthani jaat pan Baramati bhagat changli rakhli. Tambada-tपkiri rang, vajan zhatpat vadhte. Mansasathi ekdam changla, kami divasat motha hoto. Charai ani thode khaadya var vadhavlela. Lasikaran ani deworming up-to-date.

Boer cross bokad, mansachi jaat. Pandhri body ani taambada doke — Boer chi olakh. Vajan vadhichा dar khup jaast, kami vayatahi motha. Mansachya vyavsayasathi (goat farming) uttam. Sagle lasikaran zhaale, nirogi. Adhik mahitisathi sampark kara.

animalSellers.name: Shobha Gaikwad
animalSellers.statusQuote: Jamunapari bakri — dudh ani pille donhi changle.

listings.description: Jamunapari bakri, mothi jaat. Lamb kaan ani Roman naak — shuddha lakshane. Roj 2-2.5 litre dudh deti, dudhasathi ani pillanchya paidashisathi donhi changli. Donhi vetala jodi pille dilele. Nirogi, PPR ani ET lasikaran zhaale aahe.

animalSellers.name: Ganpat Tupe
animalSellers.statusQuote: Deccani menढ्या — lokar ani mans donhisathi.

listings.description: Deccani menढा (mendha), ya bhagatil havamanasathi ekdam kateel jaat. Kala-tपkiri rang, mansasathi changla. Charai var ekdam mast vadhto, kami kharchat sambhalta yeto. Dhangari paddhatine vadhavlela. Lasikaran zhaale aahe. Menढ्यancha kalp ghyaycha asel tar bolun ghya.

Madgyal menढा, Sangli-Solapur bhagatli prasiddh mansachi jaat, ithe pan changli vadhavli. Pandhra rang, undach baandha, mans-utpadan jaast. Vajan changle, mansacha vyavsay karnaryana faaydeshir. Nirogi ani lasikaran zhaale.

animalSellers.name: Pradeep Dhumal
animalSellers.statusQuote: Kadaknath ani Giriraja — gava-rani kombadi, motha bhav.

listings.description: Kadaknath kombda (kala mans-haadche koMbade), aushadhi gun mhanun olkhle jate. Kala mans, kala rang. Gava-rani paddhatine mukt charai var vadhavlele, rasayan-mukt. Mansala 800-1000 rupye kilo bhav miltо. Lasikaran (Ranikhet, Gumboro) zhaale. Kami-jaast nag haveet tasе miltil.

Giriraja kombadi, gava-rani sangopanasathi uttam jaat. Mukt charai var vadhavleli, motha aakar ani changli andi-utpadan kshamta. Mans ani andi donhisathi faaydeshir. Lasikaran zhaale aahe. 25-30 chya batchne ghetlya tar bhav kami karto.

Hydraulic tipping makes unloading quick and effortless. Heavy duty chassis, good tyres, all RTO papers clear.

products.name: Mahyco Bajra Hybrid Seeds MH-179
products.description: High-yielding pearl millet (bajra) hybrid suited to the light soils and kharif conditions of Pune district talukas like Daund and Shirur. Strong tillering, downy mildew tolerance and uniform grain for both fodder and grain harvest.
highlights: Suited for kharif sowing in Daund-Shirur belt

products.name: IFFCO Urea 46% N Fertilizer
products.description: Neem-coated prilled urea with 46% nitrogen for sugarcane, wheat and vegetable crops grown across Haveli and Baramati. Slow nitrogen release reduces leaching and improves nitrogen use efficiency in irrigated fields.
highlights: Ideal for sugarcane and wheat top dressing
Reduces nitrogen loss in irrigated soils

products.name: Coromandel Gromor DAP 18:46:0
products.description: Di-ammonium phosphate granules providing 18% nitrogen and 46% phosphorus for strong root establishment in onion, wheat and gram crops common in Indapur and Junnar. Best applied as basal dose at sowing.
highlights: Suited for onion and gram in Indapur

products.name: Mahadhan Smartek NPK 19:19:19
products.description: Fully water-soluble balanced NPK for drip and foliar feeding of grapes, tomato and capsicum in the Maval and Mulshi belt. Dissolves completely with no residue, making it ideal for fertigation systems.
highlights: Quick uptake for grape and tomato

products.name: Bayer Confidor Imidacloprid 17.8% SL
products.description: Systemic insecticide controlling sucking pests like aphids, jassids and whitefly in cotton, vegetables and grapes grown near Shirur and Baramati. Long-lasting protection with quick knockdown action.

products.name: UPL Saaf Carbendazim + Mancozeb Fungicide
products.description: Broad-spectrum systemic plus contact fungicide for downy mildew, blight and leaf spot in grapes, onion and tomato across Purandar and Haveli. Dual action gives both curative and protective control.
highlights: Controls blight, leaf spot and mildew

products.name: Krishi Vermicompost Organic Manure 50 kg
products.description: Premium earthworm-processed vermicompost rich in NPK, beneficial microbes and humus for vegetables and fruit orchards around Velhe and Bhor. Improves soil structure and water-holding capacity naturally.

products.name: Multiplex Neem Cake Organic Fertilizer
products.description: Cold-pressed neem seed cake that nourishes the soil while suppressing nematodes and soil-borne pests in sugarcane and onion fields of Daund and Indapur. Acts as a slow-release organic nitrogen source.

products.name: Tata Bahaar Gibberellic Acid GA3 Plant Hormone
products.nameHi: टाटा बहार गिब्बरेलिक एसिड GA3 पौध हार्मोन
products.nameMr: टाटा बहार जिबरेलिक आम्ल GA3 वनस्पती संप्रेरक
products.description: Gibberellic acid growth regulator used to improve berry size and bunch elongation in Maval and Junnar grape vineyards. Also enhances flowering and fruit set in vegetables when used at recommended doses.
highlights: Improves grape berry size and bunch length

products.name: Jain Irrigation Inline Drip Lateral 16mm 100m
products.description: Pressure-compensating inline drip lateral with built-in emitters at 30 cm spacing for water-efficient irrigation of sugarcane, banana and vegetables across Baramati and Indapur. UV-stabilised for long field life.
highlights: 100 metre roll covers one bed line

products.name: Finolex Rain Pipe Sprinkler Set 63mm
products.description: Portable HDPE rain-pipe sprinkler set ideal for wheat, gram and fodder irrigation in the rainfed pockets of Khed and Ambegaon. Quick-coupling fittings allow easy shifting between plots.

products.name: VST Shakti Power Weeder 5HP Diesel
products.description: Compact 5 HP diesel power weeder for inter-cultivation in sugarcane, grape and vegetable plots of Mulshi and Haveli. Lightweight design handles narrow row spacing where tractors cannot operate.
highlights: 5 HP diesel engine, low fuel use
Works in narrow grape and cane rows

products.name: Falcon Garden Khurpi Hand Weeder Steel
products.nameHi: फाल्कन गार्डन खुरपी हैंड वीडर स्टील

products.description: Forged carbon-steel khurpi with sturdy wooden handle for weeding, transplanting and soil loosening in kitchen gardens and nurseries around Wagholi and Hadapsar. Sharp blade holds its edge through a full season.

products.name: Coromandel Multiplex Chamatkar Micronutrient Mix
products.nameHi: कोरोमंडल मल्टीप्लेक्स चमत्कार सूक्ष्म पोषक मिश्रण

products.nameHi: फिलो मृदा नमी और मौसम सेंसर नोड

products.name: Shakti Solar Submersible Pump 3HP DC Kit
products.nameHi: शक्ति सोलर सबमर्सिबल पंप 3एचपी डीसी किट

labour.name: Dattatray Shankar Kale
labour.description: Mi gelya 14 varshanpasun tractor chalavto. Rotavator, nangar, peruni sagle kaam yete. Baramati bhagat usache ranat ani jminichi mashagat kartoy. Vel padli tar raatri pan kaam karto, vishwasu kaam.
labour.statusQuote: Tractor tayar aahe, jminichi mashagat karaychi asel tar phone kara.

labour.name: Hanumant Bhau Gore
labour.description: Amhi Beed kadun usataod hangamasathi yeto. 12 jananchi toli aahe, bayka-purush donhi. Ek divsat motha plot phadto. Karkhanyachi gaadi bharun deto, tofa todato ani gaadit bharato. Daund-Indapur bhagat kaam karto.
labour.statusQuote: Us todaycha asel tar puri toli ready, ek phone kara.

labour.name: Lakshmi Bai Pawar
labour.description: Kandyache khurpani ani kadhni mi khup varshe karte. Bhaat lavkar chalto, ek-ek vaaphsa swacch karte. Khed bhagat shetkaryanche kandyache kaam, bhajipala lavni ani khurpani karte. Vela var yete, kaam chokas.
labour.statusQuote: Kandyache khurpani ani kadhni saathi bolva, kaam neat karte.

labour.name: Bhausaheb Tukaram Dhumal
labour.description: Drakshachi chhatani (pruning) ani toda amchi khasiyat aahe. 8 jananchi tayar toli. October chhatani, dipping, ghad nighni ani harvest sagle yete. Narayangaon-Junnar bhagat baagaytdaranche kaam karto. Niyat changli.
labour.statusQuote: Drakshachi chhatani ani toda karaycha asel tar toli haajar.

labour.name: Sunita Anil Bhosale
labour.description: Bhaat lavni (transplanting) ani rop lavanyat mi tarbej aahe. Tomato, mirchi, kandyachi rop sarkhi line madhe lavte. Ambegaon bhagat paavsalyat bhaat lavni karte ani itar veli khurpani. Diwasbhar daddam kaam.
labour.statusQuote: Rop lavni ani bhaat lavnisathi tayar, line sarkhi lavte.

labour.name: Ramesh Vitthal Jadhav
labour.description: Fawarni (spraying) cha kaam mi karto, औषध-fवारणी yogya pramanat marto. Power sprayer swatahacha aahe. Daksha ani dalimbachya baagat औषध marto, thibak sinchanachi durusti pan karto. Daund bhagat kaam.
labour.statusQuote: Sprayer tayar aahe, औषध fawarni karaychi asel tar kalva.

labour.name: Kondiram Maruti Shinde
labour.description: Dalimbacha (pomegranate) toda ani prati amchi toli karte. 6 jana aahot. Fळ kaapun, vargvari karun crate madhe bharto, gaadit loading karto. Junnar-Narayangaon bhagat baagaytdaranche kaam. Fळachi mod hou det nahi.
labour.statusQuote: Dalimb toda ani gradesathi toli ready, fळ jpun haatalto.

labour.name: Vaijinath Babruvan Munde
labour.description: Amhi Beed-Parli kadun karkhanyachya hangamasathi sthalantar karun yeto. 14 koyte (7 jodi). Bailgadi ani tractor donhi ne us vahtuk karto. Pahaate paasun us todato. Indapur-Baramati sakhar pattyaat kaam, motha plot ek divsat phadto.
labour.statusQuote: Sakhar karkhanyacha hangam suru, koyta toli usataodla tayar.

labour.name: Ashabai Genba Kamble
labour.description: Amchi 10 baykanchi toli aahe. Kandyache khurpani, kadhni, mirchi ani tomato toda, bhaat lavni sagle karto. Khed-Ambegaon bhagat shetat rojachi mजुri kartao. Saglyan barobar yeto, kaam vel var ani swacch hoto.
labour.statusQuote: Khurpani, kadhni va lavnisathi 10 jananchi mahila toli haajar.

labour.name: Ganpat Namdev Lonkar
labour.description: Tractor ani threshing (mळni) machine donhi chalavto. Gahu-jwari mळni, baling, rotavator, peruni sagle kaam yete. Shirur-Pune bhagat shetkaryanchi mळni ani jminichi kaame karto. 18 varshacha anubhav, machine swatahachi.
labour.statusQuote: Mळni ani jminichya kaamasathi tractor-thresher ready aahe.
